title: heliotropium astrotrichum
intro: Heliotropium astrotrichum is a species of flowering plant in the borage family, Boraginaceae, known for its unique ability to change its leaf direction in response to sunlight. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Heliotropium astrotrichum include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as an infusion or decoction, with some cultures also using it as a topical application for skin conditions.
